Multilingual LCZ4r-QGIS Plugin

Source: vignettes/examples.Rmd
examples.Rmd
Plugin

Introduction to LCZ4r-QGIS plugin

LCZ-QGIS plugin integrates the General Functions and Local Functions from LCZ4r package into QGIS, allowing users to analyze LCZs and urban heat islands directly within the QGIS environment.

Getting Started
Installation

Installing LCZ4r in QGIS

Step-by-step guide to install LCZ4r in QGIS. Watch the detailed video tutorial or follow the written instructions.

Installation Guide
Plugin

LCZ4r General Functions in QGIS

Master LCZ4r General Functions in QGIS: download LCZ maps, calculate areas, and extract urban canopy parameters.

Open Tutorial
🌐 Multilingual Plugins
English
✅ Available

The LCZ4r-QGIS plugin integrates the General and Local Functions from the LCZ4r package into the QGIS environment.

Download Plugin
Max Anjos (maxanjos@campus.ul.pt)
Português
✅ Available

O plugin LCZ4r-QGIS integra as Funções Gerais e Locais do pacote LCZ4r no ambiente QGIS.

Baixar Plugin
Antônio Campos Neto
Deutsch
✅ Available

Das LCZ4r-QGIS-Plugin integriert sowohl die allgemeinen als auch die lokalen Funktionen des LCZ4r-Pakets in die QGIS-Umgebung.

Plugin Herunterladen
Antônio Campos Neto
中文
✅ Available

LCZ4r-QGIS插件将LCZ4r包中的通用功能和地方功能集成到QGIS环境中。

下载插件
Antônio Campos Neto
Español
✅ Available

El plugin LCZ4r-QGIS integra las Funciones Generales y Locales del paquete LCZ4r en el entorno QGIS.

Descargar Plugin
Antônio Campos Neto
Français
✅ Available

Le plugin LCZ4r-QGIS intègre les fonctions générales et locales du paquet LCZ4r dans l'environnement QGIS.

Télécharger
Antônio Campos Neto

LCZ4r-QGISプラグインは、LCZ4rパッケージの一般機能とローカル機能をQGIS環境に統合します。

🔜 Coming Soon

Il plugin LCZ4r-QGIS integra le funzioni generali e locali del pacchetto LCZ4r nell'ambiente QGIS.

🔄 In Progress

LCZ4r-QGIS प्लगइन LCZ4r पैकेज से सामान्य कार्यों और स्थानीय कार्यों को QGIS वातावरण में एकीकृत करता है।

Have feedback or suggestions?

Do you have an idea for improvement or did you spot a mistake? We’d love to hear from you! Click the button below to create a new issue (GitHub) and share your feedback or suggestions directly with us.

Open GitHub issue
